dsl_rule.translation_notes: Gap up modeled as open crossing above prev_close. The 60-day high approximated using Donchian Channel upper (dc_upper) which represents the highest high over a lookback period. For a 60-day lookback, dc_upper serves as the 60-day high equivalent. Exit condition uses reversal below 200MA as a reasonable opposite of the entry condition per AUTHOR_SILENT guidance.

backtest_rule.reason: Gap up modeled as open crossing above prev_close. The 60-day high approximated using Donchian Channel upper (dc_upper) which represents the highest high over a lookback period. For a 60-day lookback, dc_upper serves as the 60-day high equivalent. Exit condition uses reversal below 200MA as a reasonable opposite of the entry condition per AUTHOR_SILENT guidance.

source_rule_text: Enter a long position when a stock gaps up, crosses above the [THRESHOLD_NEEDED]-day high, and crosses above the 200MA on the daily timeframe, as these confluent signals indicate a solid setup for a sharp price surge.
